entry.title: Re: How can i close production order after techo ?

Greetings,

please click on the button to display detailed information regarding the error and show a screen shot of the error - or paste the text provided by SAP.

entry.title: Actions on table fields in object page of SAP Fiori list report app
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have created a Fiori List Report application using a template with CAPM CDS. On the object page I have a table along with header section. I want to manipulate the fields in the table upon selection of first field of the table and also enable/disable few fields.

 

As it is template generated code, I am not able to find out a place to write the code for same.

Is there any option to achieve the same in controller/cds/anywhere else.

Awaiting positive responses from all the experts.

 

Regards,

Chaitali

entry.title: Finite Scheduling not working during production order.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to activate finite scheduling at production order level but system is not suggesting new start date and finish date. System is also not picking shift when finite scheduling. I have maintained all necessary configuration and work center master data. Also attaching screenshot for points:

Also attaching error screen shot, Please suggest how to rectify this issue.


1) Tick mark for finite scheduling in work center

 

2) Shift and shift sequence maintained in work center

 

3) Formula maintained

 

4)Order control - availability check (01 & 02)

 

5) Scheduling Parameter

 

4) Production scheduling profile

Regards,

Tejas P.

Like :- Material Bo One Element data Product Category Id i want  In Customer Invoice Bo

M not able to understand where is this coming from. Can C&B and Succession planning also play a role in showing matrix managers?

entry.title: Re: Applications, Single and Composite roles are not disp...
entry.content:
Hi Plaban,

 

Please activate the 'authorization policy' 'Policy Set Access Auth ALL' if its inactive. Or check if there is any other custom policy for access request activated and does not allow user to select all access.

Thanks,

Swapnil B

entry.title: Update Last Change Date on table MSTA when updating custom fields on MARC
entry.content:
HI, I have extended custom fields in MARC table, following all the steps from the SAP Note. Everything is working fine, the field is updated succesfully from tcode MM02. But the thing is whenever I am updating values of the custom fields, the last changed data in MSTA is not updating. Is there any way that we can trigger MSTA to update the material last changed date when custom fields are updated ? Or any way that we can capture changes of those newly created custom fields in MARC ?

Any help is appreciated. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: [feedback] VB.NET in Insert / Edit code sample
entry.content: Feature "now" available as @anne-petteroe said yesterday: "this has been delivered. VB.NET is now available in the dropdown list.")

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Groovy Script Blanked Out
entry.content:
Check in the under Monitor:

Select the iFlow and go to view deployed Artifact:

If the script is still there, if so, then copy it to keep it safe.

entry.title: Inventory Transfer Referenced Document not showing in Relationship Map
entry.content:
Hi All

Any idea why after updated Referenced Document in Transaction entry, it is not showing in Relationship Map as described in Online Documentation?  Is their any special condition to be met?


Referenced Document (<Number of Linked Reference Documents>)
Choose to open the Reference Information window. In this window, you can specify the reference documents for the current document and view the documents that reference the current document.


•Document Referenced To tab:

Lets you specify other documents across different business modules as the reference documents for your current document


•Document Referenced By tab:

Lets you see which documents are using the current document as a reference


To specify a reference document for the current document, proceed as follows:


1.Go to the Document Referenced To tab, choose Transact. Type and select a document type.


2.In the Doc. Number field, specify the document number.


3.Choose Update.


After you add the document, you can view and track the document in the Relationship Map.

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: How to use rowspan when developing ui5
entry.content:
I'm currently developing with CAP and would like to know how to use rowspan in the table header.

Currently, I've implemented the table in an XML file, and the screen appears like the photo provided.

I would like to change it to look like this using a functionality similar to rowspan . How can I achieve this?

 

xml file

<t:Table id="_IDTable" selectionMode="None" rowMode="Auto"
<t:columns >
<t:Column width="50px" id="col2">
<Label text="aaaaa" width="100%" textAlign="Center" />
<t:template>
<core:Icon src="{selectMeaValRegMap>status}" decorative="false"/>
</t:template>
</t:Column>
</t:columns>
</t:Table>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

controller file

this.byId("col2").setHeaderSpan([3,1]);

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


If i do it this way, it only merges horizontally.
Is there a way to merge vertically?

entry.title: Re: Uncheking Batch Management
entry.content:
Hi,

  1. Bring all stock levels to "ZERO". You can check this in the Plant stock view in the material master under "Plant stocks in current period" and "Plant stocks in previous period".
  2. Set a deletion flag for the batches you want to delete using transaction MSC2N.
  3. Archive the batches and delete them using the SARA transaction with the object MM_SPSTOCK.
  4. You can then turn batch management off.

Let me know if this solves your issue.

entry.title: Re: PROBLEM IN T-CODE- MMSC
entry.content: THANKS BRO.

entry.title: Re: Outgoing Check and Payment
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check Manage Outgoing Checks in Help Portal. Here you can create, edit, void, cash and reissue checks. Please check same Configuring the Output of Outgoing Checks.

 

Best regards,

Zsofia

entry.title: How to inspect your CAP Java application's in-memory database on the fly
entry.content:
This blog will guide you through the process of opening the web based database console for the H2 database.

By default, all CAP applications persist their data to an in-memory relational database during development. For CAP Java the default development database is H2. It is automatically added to your projects configuration:

Maven pom.xml snippet for H2 dependency

 

 Please make sure that the above dependency is part of your configuration. Otherwise this article does not apply to you. 😉

The auto-configuration run during the application's startup is taking care of bootstrapping the in-memory database. This also provides an additional web end point with an administration console where you can introspect and also interact with the database.

So, CAP Java applications configured with the H2 database will expose this administration console under the url  http://localhost:8080/h2-console (if your port differs from the default you need to adapt it here). Once you have opened the URL you will see this login screen:

H2 console login screen

 

In most of the cases the credentials and especially the JDBC Url will already be prefilled with the correct values. If you hit the "Test Connection" button and a green box with "Test successful" appears you're good to go. If the box is red with some error message, the JDBC url does not reflect the url of the running CAP Java application anymore (this can happen with restarts or application context refreshes). In such cases you need to copy the latest H2 JDBC url from the application's console log and paste it to the JDBC url input of the H2 console login screen.

Spring Boot console log showing the H2 JDBC Url

 

Once you have passed the H2 console's login screen you can start to explore your CAP Java application's database schema. Enjoy browsing the catalog or executing arbitrary SQL commands. 😎

the H2 database console for the CAP Java bookshop application

entry.title: Re: Enable OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code for Sales Order (A2X) API
entry.content:
Thank you,
For Custom APIs from CDS Views, can OAuth2 be used for authentication? I noticed that they are not granted by any Business Catalogs, and we cannot create custom Business Catalogs either.

entry.title: FSP0/FS00 translation fields (SKAT) not changable
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Since the update to SAP S/4HANA 2023, G/L account texts in transaction FS00 or FSP0 can no longer be changed in certain languages because the fields are not active despite change mode.
More precisely, this concerns
Program: SAPLGL_ACCOUNT_MASTER_MAINTAIN
Screen: 2105
Fields:
GLACCOUNT_SCREEN_COA-TXT20_TX
GLACCOUNT_SCREEN_COA-TXT50_TX
 
Here is a screenshot of the transaction:
As you can see, only EN can be changed or new entry may be added. But DE and PL is not changeable.
 
In TC MASS and FST2, the texts can be changed without any problems. So it must have something to do with FS00/FSP0, not with field status.
Have any of you observed anything like this? Do you know what can be done?

Thanks in advance for any advice and best regards
Rado

entry.title: Whole quantity of a batch (false) reserved after GR
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have the following scenario happening and I don't know why this is occurring from time to time.

SAP -P08: Goods needs to be moved from plant A to plant B and an STO is created in ME21N. When goods are received and GRed in plant B, most of the time the whole quantity of a batch looks fully reserved instead of being available for end user to use it. This needs to be fixed manually every time. Any idea why this is happening and how this can be prevented?

Thank you for your support

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for S...
entry.content: 2.00.077 has been released en of April. This is a recent feature. Thanks for your answers.

entry.title: Re: A Complete Tutorial on OData-Based Adobe Forms for SAP Purchase Orders
entry.content:
@Hemanshi17

Thank you very much for very insightful blog. We also have implemented in the same way and now we have a requirement to send PDF for archiving at the time of creation.

Any idea how it can be achieved for OData based Adobe forms

entry.title: Re: Can you federate content from R3 into BTP workzone?
entry.content:
ECC is seen as a business suite but you need to check the version of your system, you can find the details in this Note 3057822

As an alternative you can use the manual integration as described here https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-gui-for-html-apps?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Information Needed: Cancel Open Quantity Button Behav...

After testing in my test tenant, I found that the 'Cancel open Quantity' button in Purchase Request remains enabled even after PostGoodsIssue. I suspect this update may not be properly implemented

Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Spooktoberfest1000

entry.title: 🎉 SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement November 2024 Product Release 🎉
entry.content:
Holiday greetings from SAP Emarsys! As we approach one of the busiest seasons of the year, it also marks the final product release of 2024 for SAP Emarsys. Throughout the year, we’ve delivered an incredible amount of innovation driven largely by you, our customers and partners. And this release is no different.... 

From expanded channel capabilities to enhanced analytics, increased data connectivity, further investment in partner integrations, and improvement upon enterprise-grade asset management, distribution and admin experience, we’re empowering marketers and IT teams to unlock insights, optimize channels, and work more efficiently than ever. 

So, before we all go heads down into Cyber Week, let’s dive into the November Product Release to see what’s new: 

Intelligent, Omnichannel Innovations 

We know that successful marketers must be able to engage with their customers wherever they are and on their preferred channels, in a personalized way. To help facilitate these connections and measure the success of their marketing campaigns, we’ve delivered a number of exciting innovations to empower omnichannel excellence and enhance marketer intelligence:

Mobile In-app: Inline Personalization  

SMS/MMS: Self-serve MMS onboarding (for Supported Vendors)  

Digital Ads: LinkedIn Account-based Targeting 

Conversational Channel Updates (Early Adopter):   

  • Support for New Media Types in WhatsApp  
  • Streamlined Campaign Level Reporting for WhatsApp 
  • Measure Clicks for Conversational Channels 

Analytics Enhancements

  • Filter Mobile Push Test Message & Silent Push
  • Email category and type filtering in Campaign Analytics 

Extensible, Scalable Platform Updates 

Working with customers that span diverse industries, countries and business needs, we are also committed to strengthening our platform operations, connectivity and extensibility. This release contains a boon of powerful features for IT and marketers alike. 

optilyz Integration: Direct Mail Tactics

  • Welcome, Birthday, Post-purchase Upsell, Win Back Defecting Buyers campaigns

Data Connectivity: 

  • Real-time SAP CDP Connector: B2B Sync (Pilot) 
  • mParticle Connector 
  • Open Data: Use Customer-owned GCP Projects 
  • Analytics Views for Open Data (Pilot) 
  • Batch Sales Data API (Pilot) 
  • Support Multi-Currency Conversion for Sales Data (Pilot) 
  • Engagement Events Hub (Pilot) 

Admin & UI Updates:  

  • Notification Center: Security Notification Type 
  • API Authentication with OAuth 2.0 (OpenID Connect) 

Asset Management & Distribution: 

  • Asset Tagging: Support for Omnichannel Content Blocks (Pilot) 
  • Reusable Content Blocks (in VCE) 
  • Custom Field Distribution Enhancements 

That concludes all the main features released this November, if you'd like to learn more about how they all work: 

  • Read the full product release blog 
  • Explore the full details on the product release page 
  • Register for the Q4 2024 Emarsys Release Webinar on Dec. 4th  

And if you are interested in joining one of the active pilots or early adopter programs, please submit your request or reach out to your SAP Customer Success Partner (CSP) or SAP Emarsys Customer Success Manager (CSM).

entry.title: Re: Information Needed: Cancel Open Quantity Button Behavior Change in Purchase Request (2411 Update
entry.content: Detailed Information Needed: Cancel Open Quantity Button Behavior Change in Purchase Request (2411 Update)" Main post: "Hello SAP Community, Following the recent 2411 update, I noticed a change in the Purchase Request functionality where 'The Cancel Open Quantity button is automatically disabled when a purchase request is completely ordered and delivered.' My customer is actively using the Purchase Request feature and needs to understand: The detailed scope and impact of this change The specific conditions that trigger the button to become disabled The expected behavior in various scenarios Could someone please provide: Detailed step-by-step verification procedures (e.g., 1. Open Purchase Request work center, 2. Click New button, etc.) Screenshots showing this functionality, if possible Any additional technical documentation about this change This information will help us better understand the impact on our current processes and prepare our users accordingly. Thank you in advance for your assistance. Best regards

entry.title: Personas Script for certain RF Screen
entry.content:
Hello,

The struggle with "EWM + Personas" continues 🙂

Is there any way of using scripts on "events" for a specific screen/subscreen (logical transaction + step)? If I add a script to "OnLoad" it get's triggered for all screens because it's the same transactions for all the 250 screens.

Thanks for any reply!

entry.title: Cancel Open Quantity Button Behavior Change in Purchase Request (2411 SAP Business ByDesign)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Following the recent 2411 update, I noticed a change in the Purchase Request functionality where 'The Cancel Open Quantity button is automatically disabled when a purchase request is completely ordered and delivered.'

My customer is actively using the Purchase Request feature and needs to understand:

  1. The detailed scope and impact of this change
  2. The specific conditions that trigger the button to become disabled
  3. The expected behavior in various scenarios

Could someone please provide:

  • Detailed step-by-step verification procedures (e.g., 1. Open Purchase Request work center, 2. Click New button, etc.)
  • Screenshots showing this functionality, if possible
  • Any additional technical documentation about this change

This information will help us better understand the impact on our current processes and prepare our users accordingly.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Cancel Open Quantity Button Behavior Change in Purchase Request (2411 SAP Business ByDesign)
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I have already reviewed the information you sent, and I need more detailed information. After testing in my test tenant, I found that the 'Cancel open Quantity' button in Purchase Request remains enabled even after PostGoodsIssue. I suspect this update may not be properly implemented.

entry.title: Re: Information Needed: Cancel Open Quantity Button Behav...
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/cancel-open-quantity-button-behavior-change-in-purchase-request-2411-sap/qaq-p/13944037#feedback-error

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content:
¡Hola Madrid!

We are very excited to announce that we are resuming the SAP Inside Track Madrid in 2025. It will take place next March 21, 2025 @ SAP offices in Madrid, 🇪🇸. The space for the event is limited and we can only host 50 attendees. Make sure to RSVP fast!

An SAP Inside Track (SIT) is a local grassroots community event where SAP Community members come together to share knowledge about SAP related topics. The event is driven/organized by the community, everyone who is interested may participate. Everyone can benefit or contribute: act as presenter, take part in discussions, exchange information, realize networking or enjoy the social get-togethers in the evening.

You can check out all the details about the event in https://sitmadrid.com. Also, if you are interested in speaking 🗣️ at the event? Let us know by submitting your proposal here.

Come to learn and share your knowledge with your peers as well as make new friends in an informal atmosphere. SAP Inside Track events offer SAP Community provided sessions from SAP Experts and passionate SAP Community members.

We will also host an SAP CodeJam the day before (Mar 20, 2025). More details to be shared shortly.

The space for the event is limited and we can only host 50 attendees. First come first serve. See you in March 2025!

entry.title: Error SAML API SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently testing API calls on SAP Analytics Cloud.

My goal is to successfully trigger a data import job using this API.

I have broken down the problem into two distinct functions. The first one is used to retrieve the token. This step works without any issues when I provide my CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET.

The error occurs in the second part, which involves starting the job. When I call the relevant API and pass my previously retrieved token as a parameter, it returns the SAML login page...

Has anyone encountered this problem before? Do you have a solution?

Thanks you 🙂 
Have a nice day 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to create drill down/hierarhies in SAC with Live...
entry.content:
Hi Venkatesh,

As the notes state, drill-down for hierarchies is not possible on LIVE data models. You will have to use the import data model to be able to drill down through hierarchies.

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager 2410 - Branded prebuilt Client
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently working for a customer on implementing the SAP Service & Asset manager 2410 application. As part of that, we are aiming to generate the SAP Service & asset manager client with pre-built database to overcome the initial download time(sync time). can you please let me know if it is possible to generate the SSAM client with the pre-built database (similar to SAP Work Manager Agentry pre-built client)?

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Purchase Order Release strategy not working with multiple Material groups
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working in an S/4HANA 2022 on FPS02 System

The set up for my Purchase order Release is as Followed:

in CT04:

ZPO_CEBAN_ACASCAT  Accountassignment cat
ZPO_EKKO_GNETW     total net value of the PO
ZPO_EKKO_MATGRP    Material group
ZPO_EKKO_PURCHGRP  Purchasing group
ZPO_EKKO_WERKS  Plant

Each with multiple enteries.

In CL02 I created a Class (032) for the Release

In customizing i added all the settings and checked them.

When I create a Purchase order with Materials which belong to the same Material group for the same plant--> erverything works

At the same time when I create a Purchase order with two Materials one belonging to Material group A and the other to Material gourp B in the same plant--> my release strategy does not work!

Tried to add the Value ' ' in CT04 to the Material group Characteristic  and assign it to the class. Still does not work.

Would appriciate any idea as how I could make this work?

entry.title: Re: How to extend the Standard CPQ Product Service
entry.content:
Hi,

The ImportMaterialsFromERP function has a fixed scope for field replication set by the CPQ product team, which cannot be extended through customer projects.

However, in customer project implementations, a common workaround involves using customizations on SAP Cloud Integration. Specifically, you can enhance the iFlow artifact by customizing the integration process steps in the "Post Processing" extension point. This allows you to map additional fields from SAP S/4HANA to SAP CPQ and update them using the CPQ restful APIs for product management.

Additionally, we encourage you to submit your feedback as an enhancement request for the API ImportMaterialsFromERP to the SAP CPQ product team at https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2671. 

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ, UploadCartAttachment API issue after latest...
entry.content:
Hi,

With the release of 2411, a new set of APIs are provided to manage the documents of a quote in CPQ:

  • https://default-us1-prd-01.cpq.cloud.sap/webapihelp/index#!/Quotes/Quotes_UploadQuoteAttachment  
  • https://default-us1-prd-01.cpq.cloud.sap/webapihelp/index#!/Quotes/Quotes_DeleteQuoteAttachment

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Output Management Solutions For LOBs In SAP Business Technology Platform To Keep Core Clean
entry.content:
In our LOBs systems like SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA OnPremise, scope item Output Management (1LQ) will cover the requirements of rendering PDF form used by printing, email.
 
But there are scenarios where the requirements can not be realized with standard function of 1LQ,the following are some examples:
  • Missing data even tried with key user extensibility.
  • Missing functions like need digital signature in PDF form.
  • Customers need pull data from multiple systems to render PDF form in realtime.
  • Customers need a stand alone application for partners to print PDF form with data from LOB systems in realtime.
  • Customer need to render PDF form in mobile device with data from LOB systems in realtime.
  • Partners want to deploy SAAS solution for customers for Output Management.
  • Other scenarios.
Some scenarios can be realized with On-stack extensibility in ABAP environment. To keep core clean,cloud ABAP is recommended, classic technologies like smartform, SAPscript should be avoided. Adobe Forms technology is recommended.
 
To keep core clean, Side-By-Side extensibility in SAP Business Technology Platform(BTP) are highly recommended for loosely-coupled scenarios. For Output Management solutions in BTP, we have 2 styles solutions.
 
First style is automatically label printing or email. This means when business object like billing created in LOB system, the PDF form is automatically rendered with predefined format are automatically sent to a local printer or emailed to specific contact. I wrote a blog Build Digital Document Platform Backend Service On BTP with BTP Ads Sdm Print Service before. If we use the solution in this blog, we can realize automatically label printing with SAP Integration Suite or SAP Build Process Automation very efficiently. The following is a solution architecture for a real customer use case.

 
Second style is Side-By-Side extensibility with CAP or RAP as the backend, SAP UI5 as the front end.
Here will deploy a SAP UI5 application in SAP Build Work Zone or SAP BTP ABAP environment for the end users. The following is one of the architectures:

 

For this style, we prepared the following Discovery Center Missions for you:
  • If you prefer CAP in NodeJs, you can follow the mission Add Printing Labels to Your User Experience for SAP S/4HANA Cloud with CAP Node.js
  • If you prefer CAP in Java,you can follow the mission Add Printing Labels to Your User Experience for SAP S/4HANA Cloud with CAP Java
  •  If you prefer RAP(Cloud ABAP),you can follow the mission Add Printing Label to Your User Experience for SAP S/4HANA Cloud In BTP ABAP Environment
All the 3 missions are base on best practice of Side-By-Side extensibility. You can apply the same method in other Side-By-Side extensibility scenarios.
 
The mission Add Printing Label to Your User Experience for SAP S/4HANA Cloud is based on a little old technology. I will retire the mission.
 
To better help our customers to learn the solutions, we prepared the following webinars in December 2024. Welcome to register with the following linkages, we are happy to explain and answer queries and discuss.
 
Little remind: please reach out to your BTP Customer Success Manager to get the CRM ID for your organisation before the register.
  • 4TH December 2024, Add Printing Labels to Your User Experience for SAP S/4HANA Cloud with CAP Node.js
  • 11ST December 2024, Add Printing Labels to Your User Experience for SAP S/4HANA Cloud with CAP Java
These 2 solutions are based on CAP. If you are interested in CAP,I think you can start with the Learning Sources.



The Side-By-Side extensibility method used in the missions can be applied to other LOBs like SAP ECC,SAP SuccessFactors HCM,etc.

 

The ends!
Thanks for your time!

 

Best regards!
Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: SAP 4.3 SP05 Report fetches data of current system date instead of prompt date in first instance
entry.content: Hi Jay, if you open the web intelligence document without refreshing, go into the query and view the SQL, what do you see in the WHERE clause for the prompts?. This does sound like an extreme issue. regards,James

entry.title: Re: Pricing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Service
entry.content: 2808181 - Supported Price-Relevant Fields for Service Transactions

entry.title: Re: SAP 4.3 SP05 Report fetches data of current system date instead of prompt date in first instance
entry.content: Hi Jay, are the prompts created in the universe or in the web intelligence document?

entry.title: 探索SAP S/4HANA Cloud中的碳足迹功能
entry.content:
在快速变化的商业环境中，可持续发展已成为企业的重要战略。面对气候变化等问题，企业越来越需要采取行动，减少自己的环境影响。碳足迹，作为衡量企业温室气体排放的指标，成为关键关注点。

通过与SFM（SAP Sustainability Management）集成，SAP S/4HANA Cloud不仅帮助企业优化运营，而且能够将碳足迹分析直接应用于商业决策中。这样，企业可以详细了解自身的碳排放情况，并将这些数据有效地融入到决策过程，制定更环保和可持续的策略。

在这篇博文中，我们将深入探讨SAP S/4HANA Cloud中的碳足迹功能如何通过与SFM的集成，帮助企业在业务决策中实现可持续发展目标。

  • 介绍SFM

首先简单介绍SAP Sustainability Footprint Management（SFM）。SFM旨在跨温室气体 (GHG) 范围 1、2 和 3 计算和管理碳流程的解决方案。通过与ERP系统的集成，SFM能够实现准确高效的排放计算。这是从平均值向实际值转变、迈向交易性碳会计的第一步。SFM向企业提供其碳足迹的全面视图，使企业能够记录、报告并采取行动以脱碳其价值链。

更多有关于SFM的基本详细介绍，可以查阅Blog。

SAP可持续足迹管理（SFM）的一个大优势在于它能把企业的碳足迹计算融入到各个业务流程中。这种整合不仅带来了清晰的透明度，还为业务用户提供了关于可持续性的深入见解。这样一来，用户可以在决策过程中考虑可持续发展标准。通过这种方式，企业不仅能追踪和报告自己的可持续发展表现，还能在日常运营中主动采取措施，减少对环境的影响。

了解完SFM，接下来我们一起来探索SAP S/4HANA Cloud中有哪些碳足迹功能。

 

  • 查看产品足迹

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud中，企业可以使用“查看产品碳足迹”的应用程序来查看由SAP可持续足迹管理（SFM）计算出的产品足迹。该应用为用户提供了直观且高效的方式来访问和管理产品的碳足迹数据。

每个产品足迹都由特定的参数组合来确定，比如产品和工厂或产品、工厂及供应商，再加上计算期间、足迹类别（例如温室气体）和参考基准（例如每单位平均足迹）。产品足迹数据是有时间依赖性的，其有效期会根据计算期间自动确定。这意味着用户能够查看不同时段和不同条件下的碳足迹数据，为环境影响分析提供更全面的信息。

 

 

  • 采购

在采购环节，SAP S/4HANA Cloud实现了产品碳足迹与采购申请（PR）和采购订单（PO）的直接集成。这是SAP S/4HANA Cloud在采购流程中的重要的集成场景。通过这一功能，采购申请和采购订单中的每个项目都能显示出碳足迹信息，使得审批人和业务人员不仅可以看到采购申请的财务价值，还能了解其环境影响。

 

 

同时，在“监控采购申请项目”应用程序中，采购人员也可以分析他们负责的采购申请所带来的环境影响。

 

这个应用程序不仅显示已完成的采购，还展示了那些预期未来交付的采购申请，这为采购人员提供了预期排放的重要信息。通过利用这些信息，企业可以采取积极的措施来优化采购流程的环境足迹。

 

  • 库存管理

另一个集成是在库存管理中实现，首先是在“库存 - 多物料”应用程序中。这一改进主要是为库存管理员提供了库存对环境影响的洞见。以前，这个应用程序主要用于获取库存数量及其相应的财务价值概览。现在，它还能将可持续性标准纳入决策过程中。

 

这个应用程序从集成组件中提取碳足迹数据，并通过将每种物料的碳足迹乘以其数量，展示每种物料的总碳足迹。这种功能使库存管理员不仅可以根据数量和财务价值管理库存，还能够考虑其环境影响，做出更加环保的决策。

未来，SAP计划将这种集成扩展到更多的库存管理流程和应用程序中。

 

  • 关键用户可扩展性

将发布的碳足迹数据集成到业务流程中还可以利用关键用户可扩展性功能。关键用户可扩展性与SAP产品足迹管理中计算的产品足迹相结合，使客户能够将可持续性信息丰富到端到端的业务流程中，帮助企业实现绿色可持续发展。

例如，可以通过应用“自定义字段”和“自定义逻辑”，将碳足迹的信息补充到应用“管理采购订单”中的行项目中。

 

 

目前SAP S/4HANA Cloud中已有非常多关于可持续的CDS视图可供客户使用，具体可以查看链接，支持客户将碳足迹的信息融入更多业务场景中。

 

  • 总结

本博文主要探讨了SAP S/4HANA Cloud中的碳足迹功能，展示了如何利用这些功能帮助企业在业务决策中实现可持续发展目标。整合碳足迹管理到企业的采购、库存管理等关键环节，并利用关键用户可扩展性，企业可以更有效地降低碳排放，推动绿色经营策略。希望这篇博文能够为您的企业在实现可持续发展目标的道路上提供实用的洞见和参考。

entry.title: Re: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski,

Actually, I am now checking by myself how can I able to achieve the requirement (using many approvers) that I mentioned above.

So, I though that I will need to create like that and created them.

And during checking, I am confusing that I am doing the right thing or not.

So, I decided to ask a question in community.

And if so, I would like to confirm that I will need to create users for approver in that Security > Users of BTP account?

 

And is it possible to show/hide the approval form request based on the login users in Inbox of sap build since they shared one Inbox?

Because since the workflow I would like to create have multiple approval steps like (HR can approve after Manager have done approving and only show to HR user at that time Manager have done approving).

entry.title: Spare parts mandatory fields
entry.content:
Hi,

 we have one general item that we use for ordering spare parts and it is non-warehouse item. We order all the spare parts on this item and only change the text of the item in the order.

Is it possible to set up only for this item to have mandatory fields in order for HS code, weight and state of origin if this item is being ordered from foreign country? It would immensely helped us for monthly custom administration. 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP PaPM - Partitioning at JOIN of writers pushing multiple, same instances of output in ADSO
entry.content:
Hi Expert/s,

For Calculation Unit , Partitioning is specified at JOIN of writers as well as at Allocation steps . These Stagewise allocations steps are in a way the inputs to writers used in final JOIN 

This results in pushing multiple instances of same output in ADSO , increasing overall output value, which is incorrect 

Would want to know if this can be avoided , tried putting Partitioning at each of writers and not at JOIN of writers . This actually does not  get us advantage of Partitioning.

 

Regards.

entry.title: How to add custom menu button in the object page header of sap Fiori elements
entry.content: Is it possible to add a custom menu button (similar to a share button) to the header of an object page, as illustrated in the image below? Whenever I attempt to add a custom action in the manifest file, it only results in a standard button. Could you please provide links or resources if this is feasible?

entry.title: AP Credit note TDS amount not showing in pick TDS entry of TDS option of outgoing Payment screen

     We have created AP Invoice with TDS amount in it.
When in Outgoing payment of TDS, AP Credit note TDS amount not showing in pick TDS entry of TDS option of outgoing Payment screen.
Please suggest why it is not showing in the list.
 
 
Regards,
Krishna Verma

Hi 

 

An unzipped version would be great as my experience so far is that the excel file is very basic and looks like a csv file downloaded into excel.

The scheduling part works but there is no formatting which we used to have in BEX Broadcasting

Russell

entry.title: Re: Enter Postal code issue in Inbound IDocs?
entry.content: I have a similar issue, my problem is that the postal code was set to 000000 by default, which resulted in unsuccessful distribution of foreign customer master data

entry.title: Does CAP support the inclusion of non-UI5 applications (e.g. Angular App) in sapux section?
entry.content:
I developed a simple CAP application that offers the capability to retrieve Business Partners from our S4 system. Furthermore, I added an Angular application inside the app folder which is able to retrieve and display those partners successfully.

Now I want to show a local Fiori Launchpad inside the CAP application which worked flawlessly in the past with UI5 applications that are present in the "sapux" section of the package.json file. However, I am not quite sure if the same is possible with a non-UI5 application like my Angular app.

I did not find any documentation regarding the sapux section at all, so I wanted to ask if my concept is realistic at all.

entry.title: How do we maintain code list in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have added few code list using "custom field" app for business context "cost center master". Fields are added to "manage cost center "app. My question is how business will maintain these code list in production?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: Re: Output Management Solutions For LOBs In SAP Business Technology Platform To Keep Core Clean
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" 

Some scenarios can be realized with On-stack extensibility in ABAP environment. To keep core clean,cloud ABAP are recommended, classic technologies like smartform, SAPscript should be avoided. Adobe Forms technology is recommended.
 
To keep core clean, Side-By-Side extensibility in SAP Business Technology Platform(BTP) are highly recommended for loosely-coupled scenarios. For Output Management solutions in BTP, we have 2 styles solutions. "
 
Thanks for the selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.
 
🙂
 
Regards,
 
ZFiori.

entry.title: CS11 query BOM erro
entry.content: I need help！我遇到一个问题，用CS11查询某个BOM时，选择的BOM应用程序PP01无法查询到数据，而选择ZP01才能查询到BOM数据。当我把该BOM的BOM状态改为1时，利用PP01的BOM应用程序也能查询到数据。请问：BOM状态和应用程序之间有什么样的关系？查询的时候是怎么实现利用BOM应用程序查询不同的BOM状态？ I encountered a problem where when using CS11 to query a certain BOM, the selected BOM application PP01 cannot retrieve the data, while selecting ZP01 is required to retrieve the BOM data. When I change the BOM status of the BOM to 1, the data can also be queried using the PP01 BOM application. May I ask: What is the relationship between BOM status and application? How to use BOM application to query different BOM statuses when querying? 我使用OS30检查了BOM应用程序PP01、ZP01的配置，发现这两个应用程序的选择ID都是01. 我用CS11、CS11H查询均报错，虽然报错不一样，但是我感觉原因都是一样的。 I hope someone can solve my question. Thank you very much！

entry.title: Re: Ui5 init command not working
entry.content:
If you are in BAS, you are better off using Fiori Tools. Use the command to start "Fiori: Open Application Generator".

Generating an Application | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Success factors replication employee data to sap s/4...
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are facing same issue. 

Can any one please help with the solution

Thanks

entry.title: Data archival from Oracle Hyperion application to SAP
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are looking to archive data to SAP, that was present in Oracle Hyperion application.

In the oracle hyperion application, we have data saved to oracle server in a different format. To transfer data to other systems they are saving the data in the normal format into database tables.

In reports on oracle application, they using the base data in the tables and doing calculations on the go using some oracle code and displaying it. Data that is being displayed for many of these fields is based on calculations and will not be saved in database.

Now while archiving data to SAP, they wanted to know if they can archive the data, that is present in the reports that they were seeing which are based on oracle formulas.

Do we have any option for this functionality? 

Also what the best way to transfer data from Oracle Hyperion to SAP. We are looking to archive data, which is currently 8TB in the oracle end.

As far as my understanding. I see we can't easily do data transfer for the fields which are displayed in the oracle reports if isn't not saved in oracle DB.

I see following options:
1. Push base data to SAP and do reporting similar to oracle in SAP to get the required data,
2. Save the report data in oracle application to a new table and push it to SAP along with base data while archiving.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Excel Add-in: How to Dynamically Update chang...
entry.content:
Prabhu,

To me, this hook is not to define which value changes you would accept or not, but to state whether you accept what was changed by the user, or not using the return value IBPMDBeforeUpdate = true or false.

In XSBS adding for master data I don't consider this array as it is more like a general processing.

Now if you really can select the values to be changed by managing this array, why not, and you wish to get a consolidated view after the save process, as there are no API to trigger that refresh, I would suggest to either request the user to press the refresh button (not nice indeed), or try triggering the API  SaveMasterDataSheet, I guess this one also triggers a refresh.

Feel free exchanging with me if needed here on in LinkedIn

entry.title: Re: Basic Authentication not working in BAS or CICD
entry.content: check the prerequisites

entry.title: Create _CDS API service with ABAP coding.
entry.content:
Hello,
i have a task for creation of a new OData API.
I would like to use a simple CDS view with @odata.publish: true
and to reuse an existing custom logic which has been written in ABAP.
Is that approach possible at all?

*details:
When the service is generated there is customizing created which referes to a Data Provider Class : CL_SADL_GTK_EXPOSURE_DPC. However i can not find a way to change this customization and to set up a new Z class here and furthermore the class CL_SADL_GTK_EXPOSURE_DPC is a final class.

Maybe the only possibility is to reuse this new CDS in SEGW ?

Thanks,
Rosen

entry.title: Database Table getting updated after triggering an Idoc
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

 

I have am issue in fetching the data from ADRC Table. Please find the details below : 

 

I have written a custom enhancement where I am triggering an Idoc whenever a PR is Created in SAP using the BADI ME_REQ_POSTED. And I am using the Idoc type PREQCR1 to populate the Idoc. The Issue I am facing here is populating the Idoc Address Segments.

 

Whenever there is a address change in PR, that address is getting saved into ADRC after this Idoc has been triggered because of a COMMIT WORK was placed later in the Standard Code. This standard code is currently available after this BADI ME_REQ_POSTED. So, the address segments in the Idoc is not getting populated with the latest Address.

 

How can I counter this Issue. Help greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks and Regards.

entry.content: it does not support actual rate calculation...

entry.title: Re: Integration Flow simulation fails
entry.content: Try deploying the iflow before using simulate.

entry.title: Re: Why does 0FI_GL_14 delta extractor pull all document line items?

entry.title: Re: DDMRP: Buffer Positioning in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear Caetano,

Thanks for sharing this, very very interesting. I am currently working on configuring the relevant master data parameters for the effective management of DDMRP in SAP S/4HANA. While I have identified where the values related to TOR, TOY, and TOG are stored, I am unable to locate certain key fields within the MRP views of the material master. Specifically, I am looking for:

  1. ABC, XYZ, and PQR classification fields: These are essential for segmentation and prioritization in the DDMRP methodology.
  2. Buffer Profile: The field to assign the Buffer Profile, which is critical for defining buffer levels and zones, is not visible in any MRP-related views of the material master.

Could you please confirm where these fields are located in the master data or if any additional configuration / license is required to make them visible? Your guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your support!

Best regards,

EmanueleG

MAN Production Planning (PP)

entry.title: Transform Your GenAI-Based BTP Experience: Digital Assistant with Data Learning & Adaptive Prompting
entry.content:
In this blog, we will discuss how to use BTP services to create a personalized digital assistant that will help you conduct your business objectives. The blog can help in improving the digital assistant's ability to learn from current data. By separating the AI prompt from the main application, we have also enabled flexible prompting. This allows us to easily change the prompt and prevents the need to repeatedly deploy the application.

Our Business Context: The customer, utilizing S4 HANA public cloud, has relied on an external application for end-user timesheet submissions. Given the critical role of timesheets in their revenue process, simplifying the submission method was a significant challenge. This led us to develop a GenAI-powered digital assistant for the customer. This assistant can analyze historical entries, provide timesheet suggestions, and confirm user responses, thereby streamlining the submission process. With the GenAI-based assistant, users will spend significantly less time on timesheet submissions.

Pre-Read: I'll make an effort to provide all of the references we used to create this digital assistant, along with information about how they relate to one another. Here are things to consider before we get into the specifics of each step.

  1. Before activating, please check your BTPEA/CPEA credits as there are few paid services you must subscribe to. The consumption cost of AI models is covered in the last section I added.
  2. Select the AI model that you wish to employ. Below is a detailed explanation of the steps.
  3. Currently, the SAP BTP GenAI service doesn’t support deep learning capacity. However, in this instance, we tried a different strategy and succeeded in allowing the AI to gain knowledge from the historical data. However, the learning will only take place during one session. That is, the learning will be lost when we reload the application.
  4. To put the solution into practice, a business consultant and a CAP developer are needed.

So, let’s get started.

The architecture of the genAI-enabled digital assistant is shown below. The SAP documentation page below has further information on this. https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-cap-genai-rag/blob/main/docs/architecture/multitenant-architecture.png

Fig 1: GenAI Architecture

Here, we developed an application for tracking and submitting timesheets. You may use business requirements to guide the design of your application. Let's go on to the steps.

  1. Subaccount setup. I won't go into specifics about how to set up a subaccount. The genAI services (AI Core, AI Launchpad) are not accessible in every region or from every provider. Please use SAP Discovery Center to check for availability (https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/estimator/?commercialModel=btpea). If you have a subaccount set up currently and AI services aren't supported there, please make a new subaccount just for AI services. You can still work on the application in your original subaccount. Since AI services are not supported by our development subaccount, this blog discusses the dual-subaccount configuration. 

     

  2. Services to be Procured. These are the services that need to be purchased. To assist you in activating or configuring each service, I have included remarks next to it.

    Service / Subscription

    Price

    Remarks

    SAP AI Core - Generative AI hub

    Paid

    Select “Standard” or “Extended” option.

    SAP AI Launchpad

    Free

    Free Tier

    SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime

    Paid

    Available by default with CF

    SAP Cloud Management Service

    Free

    Activate if not there

    SAP Credential Store

    Paid

    Should be already there. If not, activate

    SAP HANA Cloud 

    Free

    Should be already there, if not activate the free one

    Each service may have a different price; however you can check the SAP Discovery Center for pricing information by using this link. https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/estimator/?commercialModel=btpea

     

  3. HANA DB setup
    1. For Context:  Each conversation's "context" is stored in HANA DB. We must also pass the historical conversation to genAI for every message received by the digital assistant. A single table contains all of this history.
    2. Flexible Prompting: In order to give the program flexible prompting, we also use a different table to contain the prompting text. The CAP application is related to this. By doing this, we can make sure that any changes to the prompt don't need redeploying the entire program.

       

  4. SAP AI Core Service: The most important phase in the development of this application is this one. The sub-steps to be taken are listed below.
    1. Activate the service “SAP AI Core”.
    2. Go to subaccount->Instances and Subscription-> Instances -> Open the Sap AI core service.
    3. Click on “Create Service Keys” to create new key for connection.
    4. Click on the generated key and pick the values of parameters “clientid” and “clientsecret”. Keep these settings handy since you'll need them when you use destination to link the application to AI Core.
    5. AI Launchpad setup – Configuration: Subscribe to the service “SAP AI Launchpad”.
    6. Select ML operations, Configurations and then Create configurationTraverse to subaccount->Instances and Subscription-> Subscriptions -> select “SAP AI Launchpad” and open the application.
    7. Select ML operations, Configurations and then Create configuration.
    8. You must enter a configuration name and fill in the properties as seen below in the create configuration screen (this is what I used, but you can modify it to suit your needs).
    9. In the next screen, give a model name and version. You can either chose default (which is what we did) or select other models. Currently supported models are gpt-35-turbo, gpt-4o, gpt-4, gpt-35-turbo-0125, gpt-35-turbo-16k, gpt-4-32k, gpt-4o-mini, text-embedding-ada-002, text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-3-large.
    10. You don’t need to select any input parameters. Click on next, review and save. Now, the configuration is created.
    11. You are free to decide the model you wish to use.
    12. Deployment > take URL. 

       

  5. AI Launchpad setup – Deployment: Once the configuration is created, the next step is to create a deployment for the config. To do this, below are the steps:
    1. Open the created configuration (SAP AI Launchpad -> Configurations).
    2. Click on create deployment.
    3. Select the duration till when the deployment needs to be active, review and save.
    4. Scroll to “Deployments” section, select the currently created deployment and copy the URL until …ondemand.com. Note down this URL. 
    5. Destinations setup (to AI and to backend): After setting up all the configurations, we must build destinations to link the application to the backend and AI to the application. The subaccount where you plan to deploy your application (where Business Application Studio is activated) must have all these destinations created.
    6. Connect to AI Core and Launchpad.
      • Get the URL from the SAP launchpad deploy step (step 6.d of the blog) https://api.ai.prod.us-east-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/
      • Authentication: “OAuth2ClientCredentials”.
      • Set client Id and client secret values from step 4.d.
      • Give the subaccount’s token service URL. This needs to be the token service URL of the subaccount which has the AI Core activated.
    7. To the backend: Create a destination like how you normally would do for any backend connection.

       

  6. Design directions for Source code development: Please be aware that this is not an extract of the entire source code. You may find instructions on how to use the code included in the SAP GitHub link here. https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-ai-core-simplifying-timesheet-tracking-task-in-s-4hana-cloud?files=1

    Prompt Design and Enabling Data Analysis

    In this situation, we must allow the AI Core to function as an assistant capable of carrying out the following tasks.

    1. Engage in productive user interaction.
    2. Examine data and produce insights that people can benefit from.
    3. Develop an API payload that can be used to upload data to the S4 HANA backend.

    This is how we can define the prompt and API calls to accomplish the aforementioned goals.

    • Define AI's role.
    • Transfer historical data to AI from S4, the S4 destination is used.
    • Direct API for data analysis, user feedback, and suggestion generation.
    • After the user confirms the input data, generate the payload.

    Below are the several types of texts and how the prompt is designed.

    Prompt Section

    Source

    Static prompt

    Separate HANA Db table 1- row 1

    Historic Data from SAP (backend)

    To be fetched from SAP

    First, you must retrieve the prompt pre-data from the database table. Next, you must use the second connection to retrieve the historic data from S4 and concatenate it all into a single string. In order for the AI to provide the payload in the proper format, you must also provide a sample output of the payload. Here is an example of a prompt.

    Please refer below links for best practices on prompt engineering.

    • OpenAI - https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/prompt-engineering
    • Google - https://developers.google.com/machine-learning/resources/prompt-eng

     

  7. Things to be considered during the build phase
    1. AI Core Connection within the application. Below are the steps to enable the AI Core in the Cap application and to make it available for usage.
      1. In Package.json, use CAP LLM plugin for connecting with AI ("cap-llm-plugin": "^1.3.1",
      2. Store environment variables in. cdsrc.json and connect to the AI destination created in step 7.a.
      3. Use the remaining part of deployment URL (post .com from step 6.d) in the CHAT_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_URL variable.
      4. Also add below environment variables
        1. Resource group
        2. API version.
        3. "CHAT_MODEL_RESOURCE_GROUP": "default",
        4. "CHAT_MODEL_API_VERSION": "2023-03-15-preview", Now we are all set and can access the AI Core from your Cap application
    2. Make calls to AI Core from CAP application (to get data, to post data into genAI, get data back from genAI). To call the AI core API, please follow below steps.
      1. Connect to “cap-llm-plugin”.
      2. Use methods from the llm plugin. We had used getChatCompletion method to post data into the AI core.
      3. The inputs provided by user needs to be concatenated into the chat history and to be stored in a HANA table.
      4. The chat history + new message will go into the llm plugin.
      5. The process will continue in a loop until the AI returns the final payload which needs to be used by the application to call the final S4 API to post data.
    3. Below diagram shows how the data is passed between the different components on program execution. With these steps and guidance mentioned below, you should be able to develop an AI enabled digital assistant which can process business transactions.:
      1. Accepts user input into the application.
      2. Store the user prompt/input into the chat history DB.
      3. Get the recent prompt + historical data from table.
      4. Pass this to the LLM Core.
      5. Get the output from LLM Core.
      6. Update the response into chat history DB.
      7. Display the LLM response to user.

         

  8. Additional Information

    Pricing

    While we need to choose the AI model to be used in our application, the cost of each model varies. Details on the costing details are available in the discovery center. https://ai-core-calculator.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/uimodule/index.html#/gen The estimate is calculated based on the AI tokens that we consume. You can assume that one token = ~4 characters.

    Use Case Identification

    While we had used to used AI to create a digital assistant, you can use the service for any other requirements you may have. Look at scenarios where there is natural language processing needed, summarizations needed, insights needed etc.

entry.title: I created the SAP GUI AI Agent
entry.content:
Introduction

When ChatGPT 3.5 was introduced to the world in 2022, I was convinced it was a breakthrough that would change the world - not necessarily version 3.5, but one of the subsequent iterations. And it will. I am fully convinced of this. Now, as we near the end of 2024, two years have passed, and I’ve just finished the proof of concept for my autonomous agent project working in SAP GUI. For a long time, I had wanted to create something like this, and it turned out to be simpler than I expected.

Technology

To be honest, I find the technological aspect a bit dull. It's not the most important part of this project. Nevertheless, it's worth mentioning. The project is built on the popular LangGraph library, an excellent tool for creating AI agents. Previously, I had primarily worked with LangChain, so this was something new for me.

The agent’s behavior is driven by tools I developed. It operates autonomously, taking sequential steps and analyzing the results. It can perform several actions in a row, such as navigating to a transaction, filling out a form, clicking a button, or switching tabs. What’s more, it can handle multiple transactions within the same task. Once it obtains a final result and can respond to the user, it concludes its operations.

In this project, I used GPT-4o as the large language model. This is a multimodal model, allowing it to analyze images as well. However, I tried to limit image analysis as much as possible, as it generates costs and can be relatively slow. That said, it remains incredibly versatile. For some tasks, the agent can complete actions entirely without screenshots.

In my opinion, the agent is lightning fast, especially for steps that do not require image analysis. You can judge this for yourself in the attached video.

Project Development

What I truly wanted to discuss is the progress and outcomes of this project. Initially, I assumed that to make the agent functional, I would need to build a substantial knowledge base. I planned to prepare documents outlining step-by-step instructions for various operations - for instance, how to check runtime errors in the system or what buttons to press to create a user. This seemed like a rational and necessary approach at the time.

The first stage of the project involved creating tools for the SAP GUI AI Agent. I assumed that the ability to fill text fields, press buttons, and switch tabs would be necessary. This was enough to begin as a proof of concept. While this doesn’t enable full operation of the SAP GUI interface, it suffices for basic tasks. I also added the ability to take screenshots since the agent needs to "look around" and analyze results.

Next, I planned to work on a sophisticated prompt containing detailed instructions on how to interact with the interface and execute specific tasks.

A Surprise

I launched the agent with a very basic prompt and asked it to check processes in the system. Imagine my surprise when I received a response. It felt a bit like setting up a complex interface, placing someone in front of it, and saying, “Work.” And that person, without hesitation, starts using the interface as if they’re already familiar with it. Of course, I understand that large language models possess extensive knowledge and thus are familiar with most SAP transactions. But sometimes, the ability of these models to connect the dots is truly astonishing.

Where Is This Headed?

I am fully aware that this is a very early stage of the project. Let’s not fool ourselves; the tasks I assigned to my agent are not senior-level. However, consider the pace at which artificial intelligence is advancing. What wasn’t possible a few months ago is now entirely natural. Smaller and smaller models are becoming increasingly intelligent. The progress is lightning-fast. Could my agent, a year from now, be working in a Service Desk and performing as effectively as a human? And over time, could it also replace SAP Consultants?

Of course, SAP GUI is not the ideal interface for a machine. At the moment, we’re teaching artificial intelligence to use the interfaces we use ourselves. We’re adapting it to fit into our world. This is evident in the case of humanoid robots. They are designed to resemble humans so they can operate in the same environments. But is this truly optimal? Is this really the best form for a robot? Perhaps it’s just a transitional phase. The same applies to agents using interfaces we use. In the future, it’s likely that agents will communicate through APIs or, in the case of SAP, via RFC. And we’ll understand less and less of it.

Do you already feel the breath of an Autonomous SAP Consultant on your neck? Share your thoughts in the comments, and don’t forget to check out the video!

entry.title: Collection of String in deep entity model
entry.content:
I am Working on a Deep Entity post odata request I am facing a challenge while adding multivalue-array in properties.
my JSON format is quit complex :

{

    "tourUpdateEventType": "FROZEN",

    "tourDetail": {

        "tourId": "",

        "transporterId": "",

        "transporterName": "Default transporter",

        "vehicleModelId": "",

        "vehicleModelName": "SUZUKI",

        "vehicleId": "",

        "tourStartTime": "",

        "tourEndTime": "",

        "tourTravelDistance": 5955,

        "isSortedForTour": false,

        "isMultiTrip": false

    },

    "orders": [

        {

            "id": "",

            "sourceOrderId": "",

            "type": "DROP",

            "date": "2024-11-07",

            "slot": {

                "start": "2024-11-07T02:00:00.000+0000",

                "end": "2024-11-07T17:00:00.000+0000"

            },

            "channel": "DISPATCH_IQ",

            "orderStatus": "PLANNED",

            "actor": {

                "id": "mara/personnel/rupsinghg"

            },

            "triggerTime": "2024-11-07T11:06:19.074+0000",

            "lineItems": [],

            "lineItemTransactionStatuses": [],

            "teamId": "1012-KS1",

            "quantities": [],

            "homebaseId": "1012",

            "homebaseEta": "2024-11-07T05:02:00.000+0000",

            "homebaseCompleteOtp": "5544",

            "customerCompleteOtp": "1868",

            "cancellationOtp": "1868",

            "customerReturnOtp": "6412",

            "locationId": "1012-KS1-01-0004300012",

            "planIteration": 1,

            "tourDetail": {

                "sequence": 1,

                "isSortedForTour": false

            },

            "initialEta": "2024-11-07T05:11:22.000+0000",

            "initialEtd": "2024-11-07T05:19:22.000+0000",

            "orchestrationMetadata": {

                "waybills": []

            },

            "amountTransaction": {

                "refId": "40e649bef5374ebb87c432c658a50ad5",

                "amount": {

                    "amount": 3,

                    "currency": "PKR"

                },

                "exchangeType": "NONE"

            }

        }

    ],

    "timestamp": "2024-11-07T11:06:23.338+0000"

}
facing problem in :

"lineItems": [], "lineItemTransactionStatuses": [], kindly help

entry.title: Re: Titular/NombreRazon empty in SII XML for Spain
entry.content:
Hi

You can use SSCUI 105651 "Edit Addresses for Company Codes". The taz NombreRazon is taken from the address details.

Regards

Francisco.

entry.title: Re: How to use the Maintain Business Role Groups functionality
entry.content:
@Adiyaraja_AK 

We are looking at this group from compliance/controls perspective - each of our business roles have a business function that is responsible for it's assignment to users (i.e. functional owner has to approve any request from user to be assigned this role).

From perspective of holding records on ownership and responsibility, using the Business Role Group helps us maintain a shortlist of ownership functions to group these. Admittedly this can be done within naming convention of the roles themselves, but in some occasions this ownership may change over time, so having the Business Role Group concept allows us to capture this variation over time with internal reorganisations of structures/departments etc.

The fact that the Business Role Group can also be shown on download of business roles also assists in preparing periodic recertification exercises for internal controls; when looking to merge user-level data with role assignment data; this helps to prepare listings of relevant/specific info to the business functions to validate

entry.title: Re: CAP Java Query Builder API - How to excute HANA functions/procedures?
entry.content:
Hello,


Has anyone found solution for using HANA Fuzzy search methods in CAPM Java?
If so, can you please share the reference link.

Thanks,

Vijetha

entry.title: Re: Approver workflow for standard fiori application
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

I think that the solution can be achived using MDG and BRF+

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/c31daa52fcfaac44e10000000a44176d.html

 

Best Regards 

JCD

entry.title: im trying to generate a repor t which shows the item code item name, qty consumer unit price & tota
entry.content: 1). [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] Syntax error or access violation;257 sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "T0": line 1 col 1 'Backend scheduling job' (OBSJ) (at pos 1)

entry.title: Re: cf login auth failure in CI_CD deployment
entry.content: I had the same problem. The issue was that the password contained special characters. Simply change the password to one that includes only uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and digits.

entry.title: Re: cf login auth failure
entry.content: I had the same problem. The issue was that the password contained special characters. Simply change the password to one that includes only uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and digits.

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
@GabrieleRendina 

In my setup (S/4 2023 FPS01, Cloud Identity and Joule in same subaccount) I had the same error.

Solution for me was in step 1.5 of the blog: 

Enter the trusted domain in Identity Provider > Applications & Resources > Tenant Settings > Customization > Trusted Domains:
With a fully-qualified host name (the same I used in Cloud Connector) I got the error; when I used a wildcard (*.<your domain>) it worked.

Best, Joerg

entry.title: Re: The Link Collection for Create Sales Orders – Automatic Extraction
entry.content:
@Clover Hello, thank you for the blog.

One issue I am seeing with the extraction is: if the PDF has no UoM indicated, then the model is unable to read the ordered quantity. Even though the material number is recognized and it does have a default base UoM, still the sales order proposal has an extracted quantity of 0.

If I modify the PDF and add a UoM to the quantity, then the model reads it correctly.

Is there a way to make the model understand the ordered quantity, without adding UoM to the PDF?

Thank you,

Danail

entry.title: Re: writing in same table without locking it
entry.content:
Hello Volker, thanks for the reply.
What is the goal of adding "Quantity" in the cursor definition?
Is it needed with the "For Update" clause? I dont have experience with this clause.

entry.title: Re: can you add custom field(available on MIRO) in FS10N layout?
entry.content: Are you actually asking for FS10n dynpros (balance) and not for the detail screen displayed after double-click (which executes same program thatn FBL*N transactions)

entry.title: Re: Let's get to know each other!
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am Aditya Jairath a Process Excellence Senior Specialist within my organisation. I have been using SAP Signavio to setup Enterprise wide standards for Business Process Management. We've started by building our organisation's process taxonomy within SAP Signavio and have planned so much more value for the organisation. Looking forward to contributing to the SAP community. 

Would love to connect with individuals who have done similar work and specifically implemented Process Change Governance where Business Process Management Experts of all the different departments really start to model their own processes and generate improvement opportunities by them self.

Looking forwards to connecting within more SAP Signavio Customers.

Regards,

Aditya Jairath

aditya.jairath@fidelity.co.in

Aditya Jairath

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - OAuth 2.0 authentication with Su...
entry.content: Hey Faisal, the difference is who is in charge of generating/signing the SAML assertion and who handles secrets for the trust relationship. Only IdPs are trustworthy in that sense.

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for AS Java, through a Web Prox
entry.content:
Hi!

I see you've added the "SAP Cloud ALM" tag to this post. However, none of what you've written about seems familiar to me and the SAP Cloud ALM Product. Is there a more appropriate product tag that you could add to the post, so it gets attention from the right people? Using the correct tags is the best way to get the attention of people with the relevant expertise.

Thanks and regards,
John

entry.title: Re: ARIBA GB 2NV integration with S4
entry.content: The PO is not created in Ariba with 2NV scope. Only the status is updated to Ordered and the PO number is reflected in the history logs of the PR.

entry.title: Re: can you add custom field(available on MIRO) in FS10N...
entry.content:
To add non customizing allowed fields (not BKPF, BSEG tables for example) to the item ALV FI reports (such as FBL*N transactions) you have to (3446219 - Requirement to add custom fields in the reports FBL1N/FBL3N/FBL5N or FAGLL03)

  1. Append fields to structure  RFPOSXEXT
  2. Use BAdI FI_ITEMS_CH_DATA to fill those fields with Abap code (BTE 1650 seems nowadays obsolete, also it was called for each record, so worse performance)

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content: I contacted support team in country of residence, after back and fort emails, the issue has now been resolved

entry.title: Re: Exploring the RSS feeds of the new SAP Community platform
entry.content:
@ajmaradiaga Thanks for this valuable functionality! But it seems that stopped working a couple a days ago.

Could you please check?

entry.title: Re: How to find Cloud ALM global/subaccount cockpit URL f...
entry.content:
Hi,

In short, it is not possible to derive the location of your SAP Cloud ALM BTP Global account or Sub account based on the information available in your SAP Cloud ALM tenant. 

When SAP Cloud ALM is provisioned, a new Global account and Sub account is created. The person that triggered the provisioning is the only person added as an Admin for the Global account and Sub account. This means that only they can see the Global account or Sub account in the BTP cockpit, no-one else will be able to see it.

This topic and its possible solutions are documented in this KBA: 3123560 - Cannot access the SAP Cloud ALM Global Account or Sub account in SAP BTP cockpit

I suggest that you follow the instructions in the KBA to properly identify your next steps to getting access to the SAP Cloud ALM BTP accounts.

Thanks and regards,
John

entry.title: SID deletions-Renumbering
entry.content:
Hi Team,

WE have deleted unused SID's in BW on HANA system for some inobjects.

We wanted to renumber the SID's where SAP supporting only renumbering 3 millions a day which take lot of time for renumbering all SID's with its standard program. Do you any program/any other way where we can renumber all SID's at once.  Currently we have 700 million records but the NRIV number reaching 1.9 billion which need to renumber so that we will get more space for new SID's.

BW (SAP Business Warehouse)  

Thanks&Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Crystal Reports Viewer in Visual Studio 2022 - Installed but Disabled
entry.content:
I have been a great fan of Crystal Reports since version 9. I still have that old copy and it worked seamlessly with VB 6.0. Today, I am seriously frustrated trying to get the developer edition working in Visual Studio 2022. I have wanted to 'cry' when every solution posted elsewhere fails to work. These are my steps:

Downloaded and installed as administrator Crystal Reports for Visual Studio SP36. I called in the project reference assemblies:

CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine

CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Shared

CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.ReportSource

CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Windows.Forms

After ensuring their setup, i was surprised to find Crystal Reports Viewer missing from the toolbox. Knowing how to add, I right-click on the toolbox add items and found the control under .net framework and confirmed ok. However, i get a message that the control is installed but disabled I guess owing to framework incompatibility or whatever. 

From the SAP website, SP36 should work with Visual 2022. I am running a project on .Net 8.0 framework. Any advise from the creators? I need this working ASAP.
